Operation 'listPayments' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_context. Original summary is too generic. Description lacks information about available parameters (filtering, sorting, pagination controls) and doesn't clarify the scope (project-level vs. account-level). Enhanced version specifies parameter availability, clarifies authentication context, and explains practical use cases to help AI agents understand when and how to use this operation.

data.current_description: Retrieves a paginated list of payments for the project. Returns up to 100 payments per request with total count metadata.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve paginated list of project payments
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a paginated list of all payments for the authenticated project. Supports filtering and sorting parameters. Returns up to 100 payments per request with total count metadata. Useful for payment reconciliation, reporting, and transaction history review.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too generic. Description lacks information about available parameters (filtering, sorting, pagination controls) and doesn't clarify the scope (project-level vs. account-level). Enhanced version specifies parameter availability, clarifies authentication context, and explains practical use cases to help AI agents understand when and how to use this operation.

message: Operation 'retrievePayment' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original summary lacks specificity about the 'by ID' requirement. Description is incomplete - it doesn't explain what information is returned, making it difficult for AI agents to determine if this operation provides the data they need. Enhanced version specifies the return payload details, clarifies the required parameter, and explains practical use cases for better AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Retrieves details of a specific payment by its identifier. Payment IDs follow the format 'pay_...'.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves complete details of a specific payment by its unique identifier (format: 'pay_...'). Returns payment status, amount, provider information, customer details, and transaction timestamps. Requires the payment ID as a path parameter. Useful for payment verification, status checking, and transaction auditing.
data.reasoning: Original summary lacks specificity about the 'by ID' requirement. Description is incomplete - it doesn't explain what information is returned, making it difficult for AI agents to determine if this operation provides the data they need. Enhanced version specifies the return payload details, clarifies the required parameter, and explains practical use cases for better AI agent decision-making.
